description_long: This is a medium-sized, round orange pumpkin with a prominent, dark green-brown stem on top. The front face is intricately carved with a menacing, exaggerated grin featuring large, pointed teeth and deeply etched, swirling eyes, giving it a sinister jack-o'-lantern appearance. The carving exposes the lighter inner flesh of the pumpkin, creating a stark contrast with the darker orange skin. The sides and back of the pumpkin remain uncarved, displaying the natural ribbed texture and coloration typical of a healthy pumpkin. The surface appears matte with a slightly rough texture, and the stem is short and robust. No additional decorative accessories are visible, and the pumpkin is shown isolated against a plain background.
description: A carved orange pumpkin with a sinister face, featuring large pointed teeth and swirling eyes, and a dark green-brown stem. The carving exposes the lighter inner flesh, while the rest of the pumpkin remains uncarved and ribbed.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed carved face with swirling eyes, a triangular nose, and a wide, toothy grin.
description_view_1: Left side view revealing the depth of the facial carving and the uncarved, ribbed surface extending toward the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the uncarved, smooth, and ribbed orange surface with the stem visible at the top.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the edge of the carved face and the transition to the uncarved back.
attribute_carving_pattern: The carving pattern is a traditional jack-o'-lantern style with exaggerated, swirling eyes, a triangular nose, and a wide, jagged mouth filled with large, pointed teeth. The design is expressive and menacing, with deep cutouts and etched details that highlight the facial features.
